title: Gradient Tooltip
description: Enhances your item tooltips with a smooth, cool gradient border.
body:
![Gradient Tooltip Image Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b606dd4edff6db960e4b0f875699a6e2a7ada4d.png)

“Adds a smooth, soothing color gradient to your item tooltips, giving them a clean and modern look. The border gently fades between shades of cool blue, creating a calm and elegant feel. The classic Minecraft font is refined for smoother edges and better readability, making every tooltip look crisp and polished.”

---

Color and Custom Tooltips Available:
1. [ Red Gradient Tooltip.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooltip-gradient/version/gaFqCI6v) 
2. [Green Gradient Tooltip.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooltip-gradient/version/WDgzfaJo)
3. [Blue Gradient Tooltip.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooltip-gradient/version/0.1)
4. [Pink Gradient Tooltip.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooltip-gradient/version/XNz3jJTh)
5. [White Gradient Tooltip.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooltip-gradient/version/zSIJWFvV)
6. [Golden Crown Tooltip.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooltip-gradient/version/zmprUGBx)
7. [White Skull Tooltip.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooltip-gradient/version/zSIJWFvV)
8. [Solid black Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooltip-gradient/version/5MuvkApP)
9. [Shadow Black Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooltip-gradient/version/BlRoJp99)

Pack Modify: 
- Smooth gradient tooltips for a calm, modern look.
- Enhanced tooltips with easier-to-read font.

![Preview of red gradient tooltip](https://i.postimg.cc/YSrnz9x7/image.png)
